empathetic_output.support_response: Can you please give me just one moment while I check on your order status? Thank you for being patient as I work to find an update for you.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out for the second time regarding my order <ORDER_ID> for <PRODUCT>, which is now three weeks past the expected delivery date. Unfortunately, I've had no updates from the courier, and I'm still working on the floor, which is becoming increasingly uncomfortable. I would appreciate it if you could provide a clear timeline for when I can expect to receive my chair or consider a refund so I can explore alternative options locally. I'm hoping we can resolve this issue <ISSUE>.

formal_output.support_response: Our team will investigate the matter further with our logistics department and get back in touch within two business days with an update on the status of your shipment.
